prompt: A traditional Chinese decorative seal (chop) sitting on a stylized auspicious cloud base. Solid lacquer red (#9E2B1E) shape with four Chinese characters reversed out in cream-white in a 2x2 arrangement. The four characters are EXACTLY, in this exact 2x2 layout: top-left 福, bottom-left 利, top-right 好, bottom-right 礼. Reproduce these four characters 福利好礼 precisely and legibly as bold clean Chinese calligraphy - do not alter, invent, or substitute any strokes. Below the characters, a stylized red auspicious cloud (xiangyun) scroll motif forms the base of the seal. Flat graphic print style like a printed ink stamp - no photorealism, no 3D, no gradients, no drop shadow. Isolated on a fully transparent background, nothing else. Entire seal fully inside the frame with generous margin on all sides, nothing cut off.
